title: The Sequel Modpack
description:
This modpack is my ideal Minecraft "Sequel"-like pack, plus some other things that might not fit in vanilla.

Still, it offers great exploration, amazing biomes and new ways to fight enemies, as well as pre- and post-end bosses.
body:
This modpack is my ideal Minecraft "Sequel"-like pack, plus some other things that might not fit in vanilla. Still, it offers great exploration, amazing biomes and new ways to fight enemies, as well as pre- and post-end bosses.

It has:
Technology (Create)
Bosses (BoMD, Cataclysm, EDFREM, etc.)
Magic (Iron's Spells)
Exploration (Alex's caves / mobs, Aether, Dungeons Arise, etc.)
Decoration (Multibeds, Handcrafted, Chipped, etc.)
GUNS

... AND MUCH MORE.

i tried to get lesser known mods too, some of which i think are neat.

  External mods:

  [Born in Chaos](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/born-in-chaos)
